name: OpenTopography High-Resolution Topography Data Portal
provider: OpenTopography; San Diego Supercomputer Center; National Science Foundation-supported community data facility
theme_canonical: Global and regional lidar portal
theme_raw: High-resolution topography, lidar point clouds, DEMs, and community-hosted topographic data
coverage: Global portal with strong holdings in the United States and selected international campaigns
license: Dataset-specific open licences and provider terms; OpenTopography metadata identify licence/access for each hosted collection
formats: LAS, LAZ, raster DEM, GeoTIFF, point-cloud subsets, APIs and web services
access: Portal search, direct dataset landing pages, API and downloadable subsets; some collections require free user login
doi_or_citation: OpenTopography data portal; dataset-level DOIs and citations vary by collection
time_span: Multi-year archive; individual collection dates vary by survey
notes: Canonical backbone portal for open high-resolution topography. Treat individual hosted surveys as child collections only when they have independent scientific or regional importance.
desc_zh: OpenTopography 是全球开放高分辨率地形数据的重要入口，汇集机载 LiDAR 点云、栅格 DEM 和衍生地形产品。它支持按区域裁剪、下载和 API 访问，适合地貌、断层、洪水、森林结构和城市三维研究。该行作为门户级 canonical 记录，后续应只为具有独立价值的具体调查单独建行。
desc_en: OpenTopography is a major open portal for high-resolution topography, including airborne lidar point clouds, raster DEMs and derived terrain products. It supports search, subsetting, downloads and API-style access for many regional and campaign datasets. This row is a portal-level backbone record; individual surveys should be added later only when they have distinct scientific, regional or benchmark value.
source_type: community data portal and repository
evidence: Official OpenTopography portal and dataset metadata expose lidar/topography holdings, download/subsetting routes, dataset citations and collection-specific licences.
scale: point-cloud and DEM resolutions vary by survey, commonly sub-meter to meter-scale for lidar-derived products
feature_count: large multi-collection portal; individual collection point counts vary

name: USGS 3D Elevation Program (3DEP) Lidar Point Cloud
provider: U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) National Geospatial Program
theme_canonical: National lidar point-cloud program
theme_raw: 3DEP lidar point cloud and derived elevation products
coverage: United States, territories and selected USGS 3DEP project areas
license: U.S. Government public domain / USGS open data terms
formats: LAS/LAZ point clouds, DEM, metadata, National Map and cloud access
access: USGS Lidar Explorer, The National Map Downloader, APIs and public cloud mirrors
doi_or_citation: USGS 3D Elevation Program (3DEP) lidar point cloud data
time_span: Programmatic national archive with survey dates varying by project
notes: Canonical row for U.S. national-scale open lidar point cloud access. AWS/public cloud mirrors should be recorded as access evidence rather than separate duplicates unless a cloud-native product boundary is needed.
desc_zh: USGS 3DEP LiDAR Point Cloud 是美国国家级开放 LiDAR 点云骨干数据，覆盖大量州县和项目区。用户可通过 Lidar Explorer、The National Map 和云端镜像检索 LAS/LAZ 点云及相关高程产品。它是地形、洪水、基础设施、森林和城市三维分析的核心开放数据源。
desc_en: The USGS 3DEP lidar point cloud archive is the backbone national open lidar source for the United States, covering many state, county and project areas. Users can discover and download LAS/LAZ point clouds and derived elevation products through Lidar Explorer, The National Map and cloud mirrors. It is a core source for terrain, flood, infrastructure, forest and urban 3D analysis.
source_type: official national geospatial program
evidence: The USGS Lidar Explorer and 3DEP program pages provide search, download and metadata access to national lidar point clouds and derived elevation products.
scale: project-dependent lidar density and derived elevation resolution; often meter to sub-meter products
feature_count: national multi-project archive

name: NOAA Digital Coast Coastal Lidar and Elevation Data
provider: NOAA Office for Coastal Management
theme_canonical: Coastal lidar portal
theme_raw: NOAA Digital Coast Data Access Viewer lidar, DEM and elevation products
coverage: United States coastal zones, Great Lakes, territories and selected coastal projects
license: U.S. Government public domain / NOAA open data terms
formats: LAS/LAZ point clouds, DEM, GeoTIFF, metadata and web services
access: Digital Coast Data Access Viewer search, custom clipping, download and services
doi_or_citation: NOAA Digital Coast Data Access Viewer lidar and elevation data
time_span: Survey dates vary by coastal lidar project
notes: NOAA coastal lidar overlaps with USGS in places but is a distinct coastal management access route and archive context.
desc_zh: NOAA Digital Coast Data Access Viewer 提供美国海岸带、五大湖和相关区域的 LiDAR 点云与高程产品。它面向海岸管理场景，支持按范围裁剪、下载 LAS/LAZ 点云和 DEM。该源对海平面上升、风暴潮、湿地、海岸工程和灾害风险研究特别重要。
desc_en: NOAA Digital Coast Data Access Viewer provides coastal lidar point clouds and elevation products for U.S. coastal areas, the Great Lakes and related territories. It supports spatial search, clipping and download of LAS/LAZ point clouds and DEMs. The archive is especially important for sea-level rise, storm surge, wetlands, coastal engineering and hazard-risk studies.
source_type: official coastal geospatial portal
evidence: NOAA Digital Coast Data Access Viewer exposes lidar/elevation search, clipping and download workflows for coastal lidar holdings.
scale: project-dependent coastal lidar density and DEM resolution
feature_count: multi-project coastal archive

name: GEDI L2A Elevation and Height Metrics Data, Version 2
provider: NASA LP DAAC / GEDI mission
theme_canonical: Spaceborne lidar footprint product
theme_raw: GEDI02_A geolocated elevation and height metrics
coverage: Near-global land coverage within the ISS/GEDI latitude band, approximately 51.6 degrees north to 51.6 degrees south
license: NASA Earthdata open data; citation required by data-use policy
formats: HDF5 granules, Earthdata/CMR metadata and cloud access routes
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, LP DAAC services and Google Earth Engine mirror for GEDI02_A_002
doi_or_citation: DOI 10.5067/GEDI/GEDI02_A.002
time_span: GEDI mission observations beginning 2019; product version 002
notes: Core footprint-level GEDI product for elevation and relative height metrics. GEE asset LARSE/GEDI/GEDI02_A_002 is an analysis mirror, not a separate canonical dataset.
desc_zh: GEDI L2A 是 GEDI 空间激光雷达的足迹级高程和高度指标产品，提供地面高程、相对高度等森林结构分析基础变量。它覆盖国际空间站轨道可观测的近全球中低纬陆地区域，采用 HDF5 粒度文件发布。该产品是 GEDI 后续冠层高度、生物量和结构复杂度产品的重要上游。
desc_en: GEDI L2A is the footprint-level elevation and height-metrics product from NASA's GEDI spaceborne lidar mission. It provides ground elevation and relative-height metrics over the near-global latitude band sampled from the International Space Station, distributed as HDF5 granules through NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC. It is a primary upstream product for canopy height, biomass and forest-structure analyses.
source_type: official NASA mission data product
evidence: NASA DOI and Earthdata/LP DAAC records define GEDI02_A Version 2; GEE catalog mirrors the asset LARSE/GEDI/GEDI02_A_002 for cloud analysis.
scale: GEDI footprint-level laser observations; along-track sampling by ISS orbit
feature_count: granule archive of geolocated GEDI footprints

name: GEDI L2B Canopy Cover and Vertical Profile Metrics Data, Version 2
provider: NASA LP DAAC / GEDI mission
theme_canonical: Spaceborne lidar footprint product
theme_raw: GEDI02_B canopy cover, PAI and vertical profile metrics
coverage: Near-global land coverage within the ISS/GEDI latitude band, approximately 51.6 degrees north to 51.6 degrees south
license: NASA Earthdata open data; citation required by data-use policy
formats: HDF5 granules, Earthdata/CMR metadata and cloud access routes
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, LP DAAC services and Google Earth Engine mirror for GEDI02_B_002
doi_or_citation: DOI 10.5067/GEDI/GEDI02_B.002
time_span: GEDI mission observations beginning 2019; product version 002
notes: Core GEDI footprint product for canopy cover, plant-area index and foliage profile metrics.
desc_zh: GEDI L2B 提供空间激光雷达足迹级冠层覆盖、植物面积指数和垂直剖面指标。它面向森林结构、生态系统高度分布和生物量建模，是 L2A 高度指标之外的关键结构变量来源。数据通过 NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC 发布，并在 GEE 中有常用分析镜像。
desc_en: GEDI L2B provides footprint-level canopy cover, plant-area index and vertical foliage-profile metrics from GEDI lidar waveforms. It complements L2A height metrics and is a key input for forest-structure, ecosystem vertical-profile and biomass modelling. The data are distributed through NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC with a commonly used Google Earth Engine analysis mirror.
source_type: official NASA mission data product
evidence: NASA DOI and Earthdata/LP DAAC records define GEDI02_B Version 2; GEE catalog mirrors LARSE/GEDI/GEDI02_B_002.
scale: GEDI footprint-level laser observations; along-track sampling by ISS orbit
feature_count: granule archive of geolocated GEDI footprints

name: GEDI L3 Gridded Land Surface Metrics, Version 2
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / GEDI mission
theme_canonical: Spaceborne lidar gridded product
theme_raw: GEDI L3 gridded mean canopy height, ground elevation and footprint counts
coverage: Near-global GEDI domain, approximately 52 degrees north to 52 degrees south
license: NASA Earthdata open data; citation required by data-use policy
formats: GeoTIFF and gridded data through ORNL DAAC; OpenTopography access mirror
access: ORNL DAAC, Earthdata catalog, CMR and OpenTopography
doi_or_citation: DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/1952
time_span: GEDI mission weeks 19 through 223, 2019-04-18 to 2023-03-16
notes: Gridded 1 km product derived from GEDI L2 footprints; also discoverable through OpenTopography.
desc_zh: GEDI L3 将足迹级 GEDI 观测栅格化为 1 km 网格，提供平均冠层高度、冠层高度标准差、平均地面高程、地面高程标准差和有效足迹数等指标。它适合无需直接处理海量 HDF5 足迹文件的区域到全球分析。该产品由 ORNL DAAC 发布，并可通过 OpenTopography 等入口发现。
desc_en: GEDI L3 grids GEDI footprint observations to 1 km cells, including mean canopy height, canopy-height variability, mean ground elevation, ground-elevation variability and valid footprint counts. It is useful for regional to global analyses where users do not want to process the full footprint HDF5 archive. ORNL DAAC is the canonical publisher, with additional discovery through OpenTopography.
source_type: official NASA derived gridded data product
evidence: NASA Earthdata catalog describes the L3 Version 2 product and identifies the 1 km GEDI-derived land-surface metrics; OpenTopography metadata cite DOI 10.3334/ORNLDAAC/1952.
scale: 1 km x 1 km grid cells
feature_count: global GEDI-domain grid cells with valid footprint counts

name: GEDI L4A Footprint Level Aboveground Biomass Density, Version 3
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / GEDI mission
theme_canonical: Spaceborne lidar biomass product
theme_raw: GEDI04_A footprint-level aboveground biomass density and uncertainty
coverage: Near-global GEDI domain, approximately 51.6 degrees north to 51.6 degrees south
license: NASA Earthdata open data; citation required by data-use policy
formats: HDF5/sub-orbit granules, Earthdata/CMR metadata and cloud access routes
access: NASA Earthdata Search, ORNL DAAC and CMR; GEE currently mirrors Version 2.1 as LARSE/GEDI/GEDI04_A_002
doi_or_citation: ORNL DAAC GEDI L4A AGBD Version 3 record; DOI to be cited from the current Earthdata/ORNL record
time_span: GEDI observations including post-storage acquisitions through 2024 according to current Earthdata record
notes: Current v001 captures the latest published L4A Version 3 record observed in June 2026; GEE still exposes a Version 2.1 mirror and should be treated as an access mirror for that version.
desc_zh: GEDI L4A Version 3 是足迹级地上生物量密度产品，为每个高质量 GEDI 激光足迹提供 AGBD 估计及预测标准误差。它把 LiDAR 波形结构信息转化为森林碳和生物量研究常用变量。该版本是 2026 年检索时 Earthdata 显示的最新 L4A 记录，应优先作为 L4A canonical 行。
desc_en: GEDI L4A Version 3 is the footprint-level aboveground biomass-density product, providing AGBD estimates and prediction standard errors for GEDI lidar footprints. It converts lidar waveform structure into a widely used forest-carbon and biomass variable. This June 2026 pass treats the Earthdata Version 3 record as the current canonical L4A row, while noting that Google Earth Engine still mirrors an earlier Version 2.1 asset.
source_type: official NASA derived mission data product
evidence: NASA Earthdata lists GEDI L4A Footprint Level Aboveground Biomass Density Version 3 and describes AGBD plus prediction standard error for sampled geolocated laser footprints.
scale: GEDI footprint-level biomass estimates
feature_count: sub-orbit granules of GEDI footprint biomass predictions

name: GEDI L4B Gridded Aboveground Biomass Density, Version 2.1
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / GEDI mission
theme_canonical: Spaceborne lidar biomass product
theme_raw: GEDI04_B gridded aboveground biomass density
coverage: Near-global GEDI domain, approximately 51.6 degrees north to 51.6 degrees south
license: NASA Earthdata open data; citation required by data-use policy
formats: Gridded data packages, GeoTIFF/NetCDF-style distribution through ORNL DAAC, Earthdata/CMR metadata
access: NASA Earthdata Search, ORNL DAAC, CMR and Google Earth Engine mirror LARSE/GEDI/GEDI04_B_002
doi_or_citation: ORNL DAAC GEDI L4B Gridded Aboveground Biomass Density Version 2.1 record
time_span: 2019-04-18 to 2023-03-16 for Version 2.1 mission weeks 19-223
notes: GEE asset LARSE/GEDI/GEDI04_B_002 is a cloud-analysis mirror of the gridded GEDI L4B product.
desc_zh: GEDI L4B Version 2.1 将足迹级生物量估计统计推断到 1 km 网格，提供平均地上生物量密度及不确定性。它适合全球和区域森林碳储量、生态系统评估和模型验证。GEE 中的 GEDI04_B_002 是重要分析入口，但 canonical 记录应指向 ORNL DAAC/Earthdata。
desc_en: GEDI L4B Version 2.1 statistically infers mean aboveground biomass density and uncertainty for 1 km grid cells from GEDI footprint biomass estimates. It is widely used for regional and global forest-carbon assessment, ecosystem analysis and model validation. The Google Earth Engine GEDI04_B_002 asset is an important analysis route, but the canonical record is the ORNL DAAC/Earthdata product.
source_type: official NASA derived gridded data product
evidence: NASA Earthdata describes Version 2.1 as a 1 km GEDI L4B mean AGBD product for mission weeks 19 through 223; the GEE catalog lists the matching LARSE/GEDI/GEDI04_B_002 asset.
scale: 1 km x 1 km grid cells
feature_count: near-global GEDI-domain gridded biomass cells

name: GEDI L4C Gridded Waveform Structural Complexity Index, Version 2
provider: NASA ORNL DAAC / GEDI mission; University of Maryland GEDI science team
theme_canonical: Spaceborne lidar structural-complexity product
theme_raw: GEDI L4C gridded Waveform Structural Complexity Index fusion product
coverage: Near-global GEDI domain and forested regions represented by the fused product
license: NASA Earthdata open data; citation required by data-use policy
formats: Cloud-optimized GeoTIFF and ORNL DAAC distribution metadata
access: NASA Earthdata/ORNL DAAC dataset landing page and data distribution services
doi_or_citation: ORNL DAAC GEDI L4C Gridded WSCI Version 2 record
time_span: 2015-2022 for the wall-to-wall fusion product described by ORNL DAAC
notes: Wall-to-wall product fuses sparse GEDI lidar-derived structural complexity with multi-sensor predictors; keep separate from footprint-only GEDI rows.
desc_zh: GEDI L4C Gridded WSCI Version 2 是基于 GEDI 激光雷达结构信息和多源遥感融合的森林三维结构复杂度产品。它以 25 m 空间分辨率和三个月时间步长提供 Waveform Structural Complexity Index，有利于不直接处理稀疏足迹数据的全球森林结构研究。由于它是融合栅格产品，应与足迹级 GEDI 产品区分。
desc_en: GEDI L4C Gridded WSCI Version 2 is a wall-to-wall forest structural-complexity product derived by fusing GEDI lidar structural information with multi-sensor predictors. ORNL DAAC describes 25 m spatial resolution and three-month temporal frequency for the Waveform Structural Complexity Index. Because it is a fused gridded product, it should be cataloged separately from the footprint-only GEDI products.
source_type: official NASA derived gridded data product
evidence: ORNL DAAC/Earthdata records describe the GEDI L4C WSCI gridded Version 2 product, its COG format, 25 m resolution and 2015-2022 temporal range.
scale: 25 m gridded product, 3-month temporal frequency
feature_count: near-global gridded WSCI rasters

name: ATLAS/ICESat-2 L2A Global Geolocated Photon Data (ATL03), Version 7
provider: NASA NSIDC DAAC / ICESat-2 mission
theme_canonical: Spaceborne laser-altimetry photon product
theme_raw: ATL03 global geolocated photon data
coverage: Global ICESat-2 orbital coverage
license: NASA Earthdata open data; citation required by data-use policy
formats: HDF5, Earthdata/CMR metadata and cloud access routes
access: NSIDC DAAC, NASA Earthdata Search and CMR
doi_or_citation: NSIDC ATL03 Version 7 official data citation; product DOI available from NSIDC record
time_span: 2018-10-13 to present according to NSIDC Version 7 record
notes: ATL03 is photon-counting laser-altimetry rather than scanning airborne lidar; included because it is a global open laser-altimetry backbone used for elevation, canopy and cryosphere analyses.
desc_zh: ATL03 是 ICESat-2/ATLAS 的全球地理定位光子数据产品，记录每个下传光子的时间、经纬度和椭球高。它是 ICESat-2 多数高层陆地、冰川、海冰和植被产品的基础。虽然不是传统机载扫描 LiDAR 点云，它是全球开放激光测高数据体系中的核心数据集。
desc_en: ATL03 is the global geolocated photon product from the ICESat-2/ATLAS photon-counting laser altimeter. It records time, latitude, longitude and ellipsoidal height for downlinked photons and serves as the foundation for many higher-level land, ice, sea-ice and vegetation products. It is not a conventional airborne lidar point cloud, but it is a core open global laser-altimetry dataset.
source_type: official NASA mission data product
evidence: NSIDC Version 7 record states that ATL03 contains height, latitude, longitude and time for each ATLAS photon and has temporal coverage from 2018-10-13 to present.
scale: photon-level along-track laser-altimetry observations
feature_count: global ICESat-2 photon granule archive

name: LVIS Facility L2 Geolocated Surface Elevation and Canopy Height Product, Version 1
provider: NASA NSIDC DAAC / Land, Vegetation, and Ice Sensor (LVIS) Facility
theme_canonical: Airborne lidar campaign product
theme_raw: LVISF2 geolocated surface elevation and canopy height measurements
coverage: NASA LVIS aircraft campaigns; regions vary by flight campaign
license: NASA Earthdata open data; citation required by data-use policy
formats: ASCII data, NSIDC metadata and Earthdata access
access: NSIDC DAAC and NASA Earthdata Search

time_span: 2018-11-07 to present according to NSIDC record
notes: Canonical LVIS facility L2 row; specific campaigns such as AfriSAR or ABoVE can be added later when their thematic boundary is important.
desc_zh: LVIS Facility L2 是 NASA 机载全波形激光雷达 LVIS 的地理定位地表高程和冠层高度产品。它覆盖多个飞行平台和科学活动，可用于植被结构、冰雪高程和地表形态研究。该行记录设施级 L2 产品，后续可对 AfriSAR、ABoVE 等专题活动单独扩展。
desc_en: LVIS Facility L2 provides geolocated surface elevation and canopy-height measurements from NASA's airborne full-waveform LVIS instrument. It spans multiple aircraft platforms and science campaigns and is useful for vegetation structure, ice elevation and terrain studies. This row records the facility-level L2 product; campaign-specific subsets such as AfriSAR or ABoVE can be added later where they have distinct value.
source_type: official NASA airborne lidar data product
evidence: NSIDC describes LVISF2 as Level-2 geolocated surface elevation and canopy-height measurements from the LVIS Facility and lists DOI 10.5067/VP7J20HJQISD.
scale: airborne lidar footprints; spacing varies by flight altitude and campaign
feature_count: campaign-dependent LVIS observation archive

name: IceBridge ATM L1B Qfit Elevation and Return Strength, Version 1
provider: NASA NSIDC DAAC / Operation IceBridge Airborne Topographic Mapper
theme_canonical: Airborne cryosphere lidar product
theme_raw: ILATM1B Qfit elevation and return strength measurements
coverage: Arctic, Antarctic, Greenland and related Operation IceBridge campaign regions
license: NASA Earthdata open data; citation required by data-use policy
formats: Binary/Qfit data, NSIDC metadata and Earthdata access
access: NSIDC DAAC and NASA Earthdata Search
doi_or_citation: DOI 10.5067/DZYN0SKIG6FB
time_span: Operation IceBridge campaign period; survey dates vary by flight
notes: Core airborne cryosphere laser-altimetry product. Related narrow-swath and waveform products should be handled as separate rows only if needed.
desc_zh: IceBridge ATM L1B Qfit 是 NASA Operation IceBridge 机载地形测量激光雷达的高程和回波强度产品。它覆盖北极、南极和格陵兰等冰冻圈飞行调查区域，是冰盖、海冰和冰川表面高程研究的重要开放数据。数据通过 NSIDC DAAC 发布，需要按官方引用方式注明来源。
desc_en: IceBridge ATM L1B Qfit provides elevation and return-strength measurements from the NASA Airborne Topographic Mapper flown during Operation IceBridge campaigns. It covers Arctic, Antarctic, Greenland and related cryosphere flight regions and is a key open source for ice-sheet, sea-ice and glacier surface-elevation studies. The data are distributed by NSIDC DAAC with formal citation requirements.
source_type: official NASA airborne lidar data product
evidence: NSIDC ILATM1B Version 1 record lists DOI 10.5067/DZYN0SKIG6FB and describes ATM Qfit elevation and return strength data.
scale: airborne laser-altimetry spot measurements; resolution varies by campaign
feature_count: campaign-dependent flight-line observation archive

desc_zh: NEON DP1.30003.001 是美国国家生态观测网络的离散回波 LiDAR 点云产品，覆盖多个 NEON 观测站点和年度机载观测活动。数据以点云瓦片形式发布，可用于植被结构、冠层高度、生态样地三维特征和地表模型生成。它是生态观测场景中非常重要的开放机载 LiDAR 数据源。
desc_en: NEON DP1.30003.001 is the National Ecological Observatory Network discrete-return lidar point-cloud product, covering multiple U.S. NEON sites and airborne observation campaigns. It is distributed as point-cloud tiles through the NEON Data Portal/API and supports vegetation structure, canopy height, plot-scale 3D ecology and terrain modelling. It is a key open airborne lidar source for ecological observation.
source_type: official ecological observatory data product
evidence: NEON data product DP1.30003.001 is the official discrete-return LiDAR point cloud product available through the NEON Data Portal.
scale: site-level airborne lidar point clouds; density varies by campaign
feature_count: multi-site airborne lidar tile archive

desc_zh: NEON Ecosystem Structure 是由 NEON 机载 LiDAR 生成的生态结构栅格产品，常用于冠层高度、植被结构和生态系统三维特征分析。它比原始点云更适合快速区域分析和与生态观测变量联用。该行与 NEON 原始离散回波点云分开记录，以保留产品层级差异。
desc_en: NEON Ecosystem Structure is a lidar-derived raster data product for canopy height and vegetation structure across NEON airborne observation domains. It is easier to use directly in ecological and spatial analyses than the raw point cloud, while remaining traceable to NEON airborne lidar acquisition. This row is separated from the discrete-return point cloud to preserve the product-level distinction.
source_type: official lidar-derived ecological raster product
evidence: NEON data product DP3.30015.001 is the official ecosystem-structure product derived from airborne observation platform lidar data.
scale: site-level raster products; resolution varies by NEON product documentation
feature_count: multi-site derived raster archive

The dataset supports permafrost geomorphology, Arctic vegetation structure and surface-elevation studies.

desc_zh: Sandhausen Inland Dune UAV and Terrestrial Laser Scanning Point Clouds 提供德国 Baden-Württemberg Sandhausen 内陆沙丘三个自然保护区的 UAV 摄影测量点云、正射影像、UAV 激光扫描点云和 TLS 点云。PANGAEA 摘要说明每个区域约 10 公顷，UAV LiDAR 点云脉冲密度为 123-227 点/平方米，Zugmantel-Bandholz 还包含 8 个扫描站的 TLS 数据。该数据适合沙丘微地形、栖息地结构和多传感器点云比较研究。
desc_en: Sandhausen Inland Dune UAV and Terrestrial Laser Scanning Point Clouds provides UAV photogrammetric point clouds, orthophotos, UAV laser scanning point clouds and TLS point clouds for three inland dune reserves in Sandhausen, Baden-Wuerttemberg, Germany. PANGAEA states that each area is about 10 ha, UAV LiDAR pulse densities range from 123 to 227 pts/m2, and the Zugmantel-Bandholz site also has TLS from eight scan positions. The dataset supports dune microtopography, habitat structure and multi-sensor point-cloud comparison studies.

desc_zh: Hundsalm Ice Cave 3D Terrestrial Laser Scanning Point Cloud 是奥地利 Hundsalm 冰洞的三维 TLS 点云。PANGAEA 摘要说明数据由 Riegl VZ-2000i 在 2020 年 5-7 月三次采集，共 255 个扫描站，并配准为反映 2020-07-03 雪、粒雪和冰条件的最终数据集。点云平均空间分辨率约 2 厘米，包含洞外地物、地面、洞壁岩面和雪/冰表面分类。
desc_en: Hundsalm Ice Cave 3D Terrestrial Laser Scanning Point Cloud is a TLS point cloud of the Hundsalm ice cave in Austria. PANGAEA states that it was acquired with a Riegl VZ-2000i during three campaigns from May to July 2020, using 255 scan positions, and co-registered to reflect snow, firn and ice conditions on 2020-07-03. The point cloud has about 2 cm average spatial resolution and classes for outside objects, ground, cave rock surfaces and snow/firn/ice surfaces.

desc_en: Kijkduin CoastScan Beach-Dune 4D TLS Dataset is a high-resolution terrestrial laser scanning time series of the Kijkduin beach-dune system in the Netherlands. The PANGAEA abstract states that a Riegl TLS surveyed about one kilometer of coast from November 2016 to May 2017, producing 4,082 hourly/daily scans with 1-10 million points per epoch, decimeter-order point spacing and centimeter-order vertical accuracy. The dataset supports coastal-change, dune-dynamics and 4D point-cloud methods research.

desc_en: NOAA Digital Coast Coastal Topographic Lidar Collection is the U.S. coastal topographic lidar collection in NOAA Digital Coast. The collection supports coastal terrain, flood-risk, wetland and coastal-planning studies.

coverage: Slovenia
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC BY 4.0) according to ARSO data-use terms PDF
formats: Georeferenced LiDAR point-cloud downloads through the ARSO/eVode viewer; DMR/ASCII 1 km2 elevation tiles and hillshade products; D48GK and D96TM 1 km2 fishnets exposed by the viewer
access: Official eVode LIDAR page and ARSO Lidar GIS viewer; users select 1 km2 tiles/areas for download, with official terms PDF linked from the service
doi_or_citation: ARSO eVode LIDAR podatki; data-use terms PDF for ARSO public-information data under CC BY 4.0
time_span: National LiDAR survey/archive; acquisition dates vary by scanning block and tile
notes: Accepted in v044 from official Slovenian eVode/ARSO evidence. The landing page states the ministry enables online transfer of LiDAR data to all interested users and users can obtain georeferenced point clouds for arbitrary areas in Slovenia. The dynamic viewer exposes D48GK and D96TM 1 km2 LiDAR fishnet layers; a D96TM DMR sample tile returned HTTP 200 with a 28 MB file. Exact point-cloud direct-link patterns are viewer-mediated rather than listed as stable static URLs, so direct bulk-download scripting should be verified separately before operational harvesting.
desc_zh: 斯洛文尼亚 ARSO/eVode 的 LIDAR podatki 服务提供全国 LiDAR 数据在线获取入口，官方页面说明用户可为斯洛文尼亚任意区域取得地理参考点云。服务通过 Lidar GIS viewer 以 1 km2 网格选择下载，动态配置中包含 D48GK 与 D96TM 两套 LiDAR fishnet 图层，并配有 DMR/阴影等高程产品。ARSO 使用条件 PDF 将其公共信息数据置于 CC BY 4.0，可用于商业和非商业使用但需注明来源。
desc_en: Slovenia’s ARSO/eVode LIDAR podatki service is an official national access route for LiDAR data, and the landing page states that users can obtain georeferenced point clouds for arbitrary areas in Slovenia. Access is provided through the Lidar GIS viewer with 1 km2 fishnet layers in D48GK and D96TM, alongside DMR and hillshade elevation products. ARSO’s data-use terms PDF places ARSO public-information data under CC BY 4.0, allowing commercial and non-commercial use with attribution.
source_type: official national environmental/geospatial agency portal
evidence: Official eVode page: online transfer of LIDAR data to all interested users and georeferenced point clouds for arbitrary Slovenian areas. ARSO terms PDF: data are public information under Creative Commons 4.0 Attribution, commercial and non-commercial use allowed with source attribution. Viewer config: Lidar GIS viewer with D48GK and D96TM 1 km2 fishnet layers; sample DMR tile HEAD returned 200.
scale: national 1 km2 tile/fishnet archive for Slovenia; point-cloud and derived elevation products by scanning block
feature_count: nationwide LiDAR fishnet/tile archive
file_size: varies by tile; checked DMR sample tile advertised 28 MB content length

name: Slovakia ÚGKK/GKÚ Airborne Laser Scanning and DMR Products
provider: Úrad geodézie, kartografie a katastra Slovenskej republiky (ÚGKK SR) / Geodetický a kartografický ústav Bratislava (GKÚ)
theme_canonical: National lidar program
theme_raw: Letecké laserové skenovanie a DMR / ZBGIS LLS products
coverage: Slovakia
license: CC BY 4.0 according to GKÚ ZBGIS download page for LLS products
formats: Classified point clouds in LAZ; DMR/DMP raster products in TIFF ZIP packages; LAS footprint indexes in Shapefile/Esri GDB; WMS/Atom and selected WFS/WCS/OGC API service routes for related open data
access: GKÚ ZBGIS download page and government open-data cloud for DMR/DMP ZIP packages; MAPKA terrain export for smaller areas; classified point-cloud LAZ provided offline by locality through customer centres/order forms because of multi-terabyte size
doi_or_citation: GKÚ ZBGIS Letecké laserové skenovanie a DMR product page; ÚGKK SR open-data service restoration notice updated 2026-06-24
time_span: 1st LLS cycle 2017-2023; 2nd LLS cycle 2022-2026
notes: Accepted in v045 from official GKÚ/ÚGKK evidence. The page lists 1st-cycle DMR 5.0/DMP 1.0 nationwide 1 m TIFF ZIP packages and 2nd-cycle DMR 6.0/DMP 2.0 0.5 m TIFF ZIP packages by LOT. It states smaller extracts can be downloaded through MAPKA terrain export, while classified point clouds in LAZ remain provided offline by locality through Bratislava/Prešov customer centres due to several-TB volume. This is open-licensed but not fully online bulk point-cloud download.
desc_zh: 斯洛伐克 ÚGKK/GKÚ 通过 ZBGIS 下载页发布全国航空激光扫描（LLS）与 DMR/DMP 产品。第 1 周期覆盖 2017-2023，提供全国 1 m DMR 5.0/DMP 1.0 TIFF ZIP；第 2 周期覆盖 2022-2026，提供 0.5 m DMR 6.0/DMP 2.0 分 LOT ZIP。分类点云以 LAZ 格式存在，小范围可通过 MAPKA 地形导出，大体量点云因 TB 级规模通过客户中心/订单离线提供；页面标注许可为 CC BY 4.0。
desc_en: Slovakia’s ÚGKK/GKÚ publishes national airborne laser scanning (LLS) and DMR/DMP products through the ZBGIS download page. The first LLS cycle covers 2017-2023 with nationwide 1 m DMR 5.0/DMP 1.0 TIFF ZIP packages, while the second cycle covers 2022-2026 with 0.5 m DMR 6.0/DMP 2.0 products by LOT. Classified point clouds are in LAZ; smaller extracts can be exported through MAPKA terrain tools and bulk point-cloud delivery is mediated offline by customer centres because the archive is several terabytes. The page marks the products as CC BY 4.0.
access_status: open; online for derived DMR/DMP and small extracts, offline/order-mediated for bulk LAZ point clouds
source_type: official national mapping/cadastre authority product portal
evidence: Official GKÚ ZBGIS page lists Letecké laserové skenovanie a DMR, 1st-cycle LLS 2017-2023, 2nd-cycle LLS 2022-2026, DMR/DMP TIFF ZIP downloads, CC BY 4.0 license, MAPKA small-area export, LAZ classified point clouds, offline locality delivery for multi-terabyte point-cloud volumes, order forms, and LAS footprint downloads. ÚGKK restoration notice updated 2026-06-24 states open data including airborne laser scanning were restored from 2025-08-27 with direct dataset downloads and services.
scale: national airborne laser scanning cycles; 1 m derived products for cycle 1 and 0.5 m derived products for cycle 2; classified LAZ point-cloud archive by locality/LOT
feature_count: national multi-cycle LLS archive; several TB of classified point clouds plus DMR/DMP packages
file_size: DMR/DMP ZIP packages range from GB to hundreds of GB; point-cloud LAZ archive is several TB; LAS footprint indexes 3-480 MB depending cycle/format

name: NASA G-LiHT Lidar Point Cloud V001
provider: NASA Goddard Space Flight Center / Land Processes DAAC (LP DAAC)
theme_canonical: Airborne ecosystem lidar mission
theme_raw: Goddard’s LiDAR, Hyperspectral, and Thermal Imager (G-LiHT) GLLIDARPC V001
coverage: North and Central America study sites, including CONUS, Alaska, Puerto Rico and Mexico
license: Creative Commons BY 4.0 according to NASA G-LiHT Registry of Open Data on AWS; NASA Earth Science full and open data policy applies
formats: ASPRS LAS 1.1 point clouds; low-resolution PNG browse; related G-LiHT products include GeoTIFF DTM/CHM/metrics, KML flight trajectories, ENVI hyperspectral products and AWS cloud access
access: NASA Earthdata catalog and Earthdata Search/LP DAAC access; G-LiHT Data Center webmap for preview/download; direct file browsing at glihtdata.gsfc.nasa.gov/files/G-LiHT/; cloud-enabled protected S3 access via Earthdata Login/AWS credentials
doi_or_citation: https://doi.org/10.5067/Community/GLIHT/GLLIDARPC.001; Cook et al. 2013 Remote Sensing doi:10.3390/rs5084045
time_span: 2011-06-30 to present; temporal resolution varies by acquisition
notes: Accepted in v046 as an official NASA airborne LiDAR product distinct from GEDI orbital lidar products already in the catalog. Earthdata lists GLLIDARPC V001 as a cloud-enabled LAS dataset with CMR concept C2763264735-LPCLOUD, >10 points/m2 point density, 26,714 files/granules and 1 m spatial resolution metadata. Access may require Earthdata Login for Earthdata/AWS protected buckets, while the G-LiHT Data Center also provides webmap and file browsing/download routes.
desc_zh: NASA G-LiHT Lidar Point Cloud V001 是 Goddard 的机载 LiDAR、成像光谱和热红外联合观测任务中的点云产品。Earthdata 将其列为 LP DAAC 数据集，提供高密度单次 LiDAR 回波点云，包括三维坐标、分类地面回波、AGL 高度和表观反射率，格式为 ASPRS LAS 1.1。G-LiHT Data Center 和 Earthdata/AWS 提供预览与下载路径，适合森林结构、生态系统功能、生物量、碳储量和多传感器融合研究。
desc_en: NASA G-LiHT Lidar Point Cloud V001 is the point-cloud product from Goddard’s airborne LiDAR, hyperspectral and thermal imaging mission. Earthdata lists it as an LP DAAC dataset that provides high-density individual LiDAR returns, including 3D coordinates, classified ground returns, above-ground-level heights and apparent reflectance in ASPRS LAS 1.1 format. The G-LiHT Data Center plus Earthdata/AWS routes support browsing and downloading for forest structure, ecosystem function, biomass, carbon-stock and multi-sensor fusion studies.
access_status: open; Earthdata Login may be required for protected cloud access
source_type: official NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC airborne mission product
evidence: NASA Earthdata page: G-LiHT Lidar Point Cloud V001 / GLLIDARPC version 001, DOI 10.5067/Community/GLIHT/GLLIDARPC.001, LAS format, cloud-enabled dataset, CMR concept C2763264735-LPCLOUD, spatial resolution 1 m, temporal extent 2011-06-30 to present, 26,714 files/granules, >10 points/m2, LAS 1.1 ASPRS point clouds with 3D coordinates/classified ground/AGL/apparent reflectance. G-LiHT Data Center: webmap downloads, direct file browsing, LAS 1.1 point clouds and open access data distribution. AWS Open Data Registry: CC BY 4.0 license and Earthdata Login/AWS credential access.
scale: airborne campaign swaths over North and Central America; >10 points/m2 point density; 1 m product/browse metadata
feature_count: 26,714 Earthdata files/granules as listed by Earthdata at capture time
file_size: Earthdata page lists dataset size 254.3 MB at a glance; individual Data Center LAS files commonly exceed 100 MB and vary by acquisition/tile

name: CEDA NERC-ARF Airborne LiDAR LAS Archive
provider: Centre for Environmental Data Analysis (CEDA) / NERC Airborne Research Facility (NERC-ARF, formerly ARSF)
theme_canonical: Research airborne lidar archive
theme_raw: NERC Airborne Research and Survey Facility (ARSF) / NERC-ARF remote sensing data with airborne LiDAR
coverage: Selected airborne campaign sites, primarily UK and international NERC research flights
license: Open Government Licence v3.0 on inspected CEDA LiDAR flight records; access requires registered CEDA user account
formats: LAS LiDAR point clouds; selected LiDAR-derived elevation/terrain models; hyperspectral ENVI binaries, aerial photography TIFF/PNG/JPG and ancillary ASCII/PDF files depending on flight record
access: CEDA catalogue and CEDA Archive Web Download Service; individual flight folders under data.ceda.ac.uk/neodc/arsf/; register/login required for access to many datasets
doi_or_citation: NERC Airborne Research and Survey Facility; Airborne Research and Survey Facility (2007): NERC Airborne Research and Survey Facility (ARSF) Remote Sensing Data. NERC Earth Observation Data Centre; example DOI 10.5285/24c097cf77474644a4b3b17286abcd91
time_span: ARSF/ARF airborne campaign archive; inspected LiDAR examples include 2003-2008 Optech ALTM 3033 instrument era and later 2012/2014 flight records
notes: Accepted in v047 as an official institutional archive entry rather than a single flight. The collection page states ARSF included LiDAR data from an Optech ALTM 3033 instrument and that NEODC holds ARSF data plus selected LiDAR-derived elevation/terrain models. Inspected CEDA flight records show Online status, OGL v3 licensing, register/login access, LAS LiDAR files and archive download links. Individual flight records should be catalogued separately only when they represent high-value study datasets not already covered.
desc_zh: 英国 CEDA/NERC-ARF 航空遥感档案保存了 NERC Airborne Research and Survey Facility 及后续 NERC Airborne Research Facility 的多传感器飞行数据，其中包括 Optech ALTM 3033、Leica ALS50II 等机载 LiDAR 采集。官方集合记录说明 NEODC/CEDA 保存 ARSF 档案并包含 LiDAR 派生高程/地形模型；具体飞行记录显示 LiDAR 数据以 LAS 格式提供，部分记录采用英国 Open Government Licence v3.0，访问通常需要注册 CEDA 账号。该入口适合查找英国及国际 NERC 研究飞行中的开放/可注册访问 LiDAR 点云。
desc_en: The UK CEDA/NERC-ARF airborne archive preserves multi-sensor flight data from the NERC Airborne Research and Survey Facility and successor Airborne Research Facility, including airborne LiDAR acquisitions from instruments such as Optech ALTM 3033 and Leica ALS50II. The official collection record states that NEODC/CEDA holds the ARSF archive and selected LiDAR-derived elevation and terrain models; inspected flight records expose LAS LiDAR files, OGL v3 licensing on those records and CEDA archive download links, usually requiring a registered CEDA account. This row records the institutional discovery/access route for open or registration-access NERC airborne LiDAR point clouds.
access_status: open or registration-access; CEDA account required for many downloads
source_type: official environmental data archive / research airborne facility catalogue
evidence: CEDA collection record: NERC ARSF remote sensing data includes LiDAR from Optech ALTM 3033; NEODC holds ARSF archive and selected LiDAR-derived elevation/terrain models. Instrument record: Optech 3033 airborne laser scanner, typical 1-4 points/m2, better than +/-15 cm absolute accuracy from 1200 m, deployed by ARSF from 2003 to 2008. Example CEDA flight 2012_250: online, citable, 2.86K files/559GB, OGL v3, registered CEDA access, LiDAR data in LAS format. NERC data-search 2014_303 record: full-waveform airborne LiDAR using Leica ALS50II, LAS format, OGL v3, download link under data.ceda.ac.uk/neodc/arsf/.
scale: flight/campaign archive; individual datasets range from site-scale campaigns to hundreds of GB per flight record
feature_count: institutional archive with many ARSF/NERC-ARF flight records; inspected example 2.86K files / 559GB
file_size: varies by flight; inspected example CEDA flight record lists 559GB
